summary: End-to-end verification of Rajkumari Luxury Spices MVP. Backend: 18/18 pytest tests passed (root, products, auth, admin gating, Stripe checkout session+status, orders/mine, validations). Frontend: All critical flows passed — home rendering with hero 3D packet & all sections, navbar, product showcase (3 home cards / 4 shop cards), add-to-cart with qty inc/dec, cart subtotal updates, cart localStorage persistence across navigation, admin gating (unauth→/login, non-admin→/), admin login + 3 stat cards + 3 tabs (orders/users/products), register flow auto-auth, invalid login returns 401, Stripe checkout session returns 200 with valid stripe url + session_id + order_id.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: review_request mentions GET /api/products/shuddh-essence in the test list, but the seeded slug set is shuddh-haldi/shuddh-mirchi/shuddh-dhaniya/royal-garam-masala — confirm the intended slug naming with PM (likely doc typo).

server.py: payment_status='paid' check guards the status-poll update; once paid further updates are skipped which is correct, but order.status remains the raw stripe status when not paid (e.g. 'open' / 'expired'). Consider normalising.
Stripe webhook handler swallows exceptions silently (returns ok:false) — add structured logging and metric/alert hook for production.
JWT secret has a fallback default in code — fine since .env provides it, but consider raising at startup if missing in prod.
Admin route /api/admin/users returns the full user document (minus password/_id) including role and created_at — acceptable but ensure no PII added later leaks via this endpoint.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@rajkumari.in / Royal@2026 (seeded). Test users created dynamically with TEST_<uuid>@example.com / TestPass@123.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ prefixed user accounts and a few Stripe-test checkout sessions + orders (payment_status: pending) during testing. These do not pollute production data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all required flows including admin RBAC (403), Stripe session creation + status, register/login, products list and slug detail. Frontend Playwright flows verified using data-testid attributes (nav-*, hero-*, showcase-section, story-section, why-section, about-section, product-card-<slug>, add-to-cart-<slug>, cart-drawer, cart-inc-<slug>, cart-dec-<slug>, cart-remove-<slug>, cart-subtotal, cart-checkout-btn, login-*, register-*, admin-page, stat-{orders|patrons|products}, admin-tab-{orders|users|products}). Stripe checkout verified via network interception: POST /api/checkout/session -> 200 with {url, session_id, order_id}; backend persists payment_transactions + orders. No bugs found.
